task_completion.description: Verifies the main container, profile photo placement, and header text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a main container shape on the draw.io canvas. Inside, the top-left should have the imported profile photo. Next to the photo, there must be text reading 'Penny Parker' and 'Senior Project Manager'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the two-column layout for Bio, Demographics, Goals, and Frustrations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Below the header, check for text elements arranged in two distinct columns: 'Bio' and 'Demographics' on the left side, and 'Goals' and 'Frustrations' on the right side.

task_completion.description: Verifies the Personality section has three visual sliders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Personality' section at the bottom of the card containing exactly three horizontal lines, each with a circle shape acting as a slider handle.

task_completion.description: Verifies the correct positioning of the slider handles based on the persona traits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the circle positions on the three sliders: the Introvert-Extrovert handle must be positioned near the right end, the Analytical-Creative handle near the left end, and the Tech-Savvy handle near the right end.

task_completion.description: Verifies the file was saved and exported with the correct names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the draw.io window title showing 'persona_card.drawio' and evidence of exporting to 'persona_card.png' (e.g., the export dialog, save as dialog, or a file manager showing the newly created PNG file on the Desktop).

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the draw.io Desktop GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the draw.io Desktop application interface being actively used to draw shapes, add text, and arrange elements, rather than terminal commands generating the file.

integrity.description: Verifies the actual profile photo was imported.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that a real image (penny.jpg) is visible on the canvas, not just a drawn rectangle or a text placeholder saying 'photo'.

integrity.description: Verifies the PNG was exported using the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using the File -> Export as -> PNG menu in draw.io, rather than using a terminal conversion tool like ImageMagick.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output filenames are 'persona_card.drawio' and 'persona_card.png'. The personality sliders require a minimum of 3 line shapes and 3 circle (ellipse) shapes. Note: The automated text verifier specifically checks for the presence of the words 'Penny', 'Parker', 'Project Manager', 'Introvert', 'Extrovert', 'Goals', and 'Frustrations' in the final file.
